_comment: Stage 9e Inner arc miter (XFAIL — non-default Blender feature not yet implemented in vibe3d): same setup as lshape_reflex_two_edges but with miter_inner=ARC and seg=2. Blender produces 24v/16f with curved arc geometry inserted at the reflex corner; vibe3d's sharp miter produces 18v/12f. Implementing inner arc miter requires detecting the reflex configuration and emitting an arc-of-cap-profile-samples + extra faces between the strip endcaps and bv.vert. Niche advanced styling — sharp miter (default) is what 99%+ of users want.
